title: First Term Examination Schedule Released
content: First term examinations for Grade 1 to 12 will commence from May 25, 2026. Detailed routine is available at the school reception.

title: Admission Open for Academic Year 2083
content: Online and in-person admissions are now open for Nursery to Grade 11. Early bird discounts available until Asar 15.

title: Summer Vacation Notice
content: Summer vacation will be observed from Asar 1 to Asar 20, 2083. School reopens on Asar 21.

title: Annual Sports Meet Registration Open
content: Students interested in participating in the Annual Sports Meet must register with their class teachers by Baisakh 25.

title: Parent-Teacher Meeting Scheduled
content: The second Parent-Teacher Meeting for this academic year is scheduled for Jestha 10, 2083. All parents are requested to attend.

title: New Computer Lab Inauguration
content: The newly upgraded computer lab with 40 workstations will be inaugurated by the Chairman on Chaitra 20.

title: Holi Celebration and Early Dismissal
content: Holi celebration will be organized at school on Chaitra 5. School will close at 12:00 PM. Students are advised to wear old clothes.
